title: 宝塚記念の後に・強えからこそ渇くのよ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One and Tamamo Cross both lose. Tamamo
Cross, frustrated by this loss, swears she'll never
let victory slip away again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is moved by her rival's unflagging thirst
for victory, and she vows to be the one to win the
Takarazuka Kinen the following year.
